title: PairEvent
description: Audit-log entry + Hub uplink event for all pair-protocol state transitions. Sole payload of meshsat/{bridge_id}/pair/completed AND .../pair/failed MQTT topics.

bridge_id.description: UUID or operator-chosen ID of the emitting bridge

client_id.description: UUID of the client (present for pair.completed + pair.claim.* events)

cert_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 hex of issued cert DER (present for pair.completed)

reason.description: Failure reason (present for pair.claim.csr-invalid, pair.claim.hmac-invalid, pair.claim.rejected)

leaf_id.description: ca_root.id of the leaf approaching expiry (present for pair.ca.leaf-near-expiry)

expires_in_days.description: Days until leaf expiry (present for pair.ca.leaf-near-expiry, ≤7 per REQ-012)

armed_by_session.description: Operator session ID (present for pair.arm.start when arm came via /api/pair/arm with operator-session-id per REQ-023)

paired_clients_invalidated.description: Count of paired_client rows invalidated by CA root regeneration (present for pair.ca.regenerated)
